← Image Tools

Image Compressor

Reduce image file size instantly — no quality loss, no uploads, no account needed.

🗜️

Drop your image here

JPG, PNG or WebP. Runs entirely in your browser.

🔒 Your files never leave your device. Everything happens locally.

How to compress an image without losing quality

Upload your JPG, PNG or WebP image, drag the quality slider to your preferred setting, and click Download. The compressor uses browser-based canvas rendering to reduce file size while preserving as much visual quality as possible. For most photos, a quality setting of 70–80% reduces file size by 50–80% with barely noticeable degradation.

Which image formats are supported?

The compressor accepts JPG, JPEG, PNG and WebP images. The output file is saved as a JPG, which gives the best balance of file size and compatibility across all devices, browsers and platforms.

How much smaller will my image get?

Results vary depending on the original file and quality setting, but typical reductions are 40–80%. A 3 MB photo from a smartphone can often be reduced to under 500 KB with no perceptible quality loss at 75% quality. Use a lower quality setting for thumbnails or previews, and a higher setting for print or detailed work.

Why compress images?

Smaller images load faster on websites and apps, which improves Core Web Vitals scores and SEO rankings. Compressed images are also easier to share by email or messaging, and take up less storage on your device. Page speed studies consistently show that image optimization is one of the highest-impact improvements a website can make.

Is my image safe?

Yes. Your image never leaves your device. All compression happens locally inside your browser using the HTML5 Canvas API. No files are ever uploaded to any server, which means your photos stay completely private.
